<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/ingest/events/restore-archive/"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Retrieve an archived event batch from S3 and re-import events into PostgreSQL.

Query params:
- batch_id: ID of the ArchivedEventBatch to restore

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
